metadata.name: MetalLB Layer2 Bootstrap
metadata.description: Practical MetalLB bootstrap manifests for the common homelab path: an IPAddressPool plus L2Advertisement for bare-metal LoadBalancer services.

items.name: namespace
items.title: MetalLB namespace
items.description: Namespace where MetalLB custom resources live.

items.name: create_namespace
items.title: Create namespace
items.description: Render the MetalLB namespace manifest before the pool configuration.

items.name: pool_name
items.title: Pool name
items.description: Name of the MetalLB IPAddressPool resource.

items.name: advertisement_name
items.title: Advertisement name
items.description: Name of the MetalLB L2Advertisement resource.

items.name: address_range
items.title: Address range
items.description: Single IP, CIDR, or start-end range reserved for LoadBalancer services.

items.name: auto_assign
items.title: Auto assign
items.description: Allow MetalLB to assign IPs automatically from this pool.

items.name: avoid_buggy_ips
items.title: Avoid buggy IPs
items.description: Skip .0 and .255 style addresses for networks with broken consumer gear.

items.name: bind_interfaces_enabled
items.title: Bind interfaces
items.description: Restrict ARP announcements to a specific host interface.

items.name: bind_interface
items.title: Interface name
items.description: Interface used for Layer2 announcements when interface binding is enabled.

items.name: node_selector_enabled
items.title: Node selector
items.description: Limit announcements to nodes with a specific label.

items.name: node_selector_key
items.title: Node selector key
items.description: Node label key used when node selection is enabled.

items.name: node_selector_value
items.title: Node selector value
items.description: Node label value used when node selection is enabled.
